query:
INSERT INTO players (userId, name, email, type, isPremium, lastActivityAt)
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, 'registered', COALESCE(u.isPremium, 0), u.updatedAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN players p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE p.id IS NULL
ORDER BY u.updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 100;
